textByHashes.de318766327c15eef9b652fb867ba2b7a3f61de8: Oh dear, oh dear, oh dear...
textByHashes.2bcf5ea500b6b795899a9861117fcde4f42a7b3c: Oh, never mind, dearie. What can I do for you?
textByHashes.e365daa90a14edf076e5faae15efae01b9e9a13d: Ooh, it's dangerous up there at the moment!
textByHashes.187b2bb226c2bed69fadb41eb264cef520584bd4: It's dangerous up there for me too, dearie.
textByHashes.6392925d37806ef048bf149dd22e7936f8afb475: Ooh, that's better! I'll take you up north for 50 shiny coins.
textByHashes.72303efa091b82c3d6167431c280f2c6504b22f4: Then you can find your own way north, dearie!
textByHashes.b1184c7f92ef647e7f6b8ee9424cd696744caded: I'll be glad to get away from this place, dearie! Fancy a lift up the river?
textByHashes.eb8168c97596390d8aad1e3f11312c375edac7bf: Hello dearie. Heading up north to the Fishing Colony, are we?
textByHashes.d22d3e0450bb69e2c3f8de7072ca69bb2592bd10: Are ye wantin' a lift up the river, dearie?
textByHashes.b32b3c6aac076696a0a34897d1f2da09ac905d90: Oh, Franklin doesn't like it if I take my boat too close. He says I'll damage the nets and scare the fish. But were you wanting a lift up to the river?
